entries.label: Version 1
entries.prompt:
Recreate the same solutions template page layout used for "Crypto Commerce":
1. Hero card (rounded, soft accent-tinted background): back link "← Back to solutions", small uppercase eyebrow label, large bold H1 headline, one-paragraph subtext.
2. "The Risk" section (two columns, light grey background): left has label "THE RISK", a large bold stat, and a short paragraph; right has a rounded accent-tinted callout card with a short bold centered uppercase phrase.
3. "Key benefits" section (white background): H2 "Key benefits", grid of rounded light-grey cards (2 per row), each with a bold title and short description.
4. Closing CTA section (light grey background): centered H2 question with a solid accent-colored button beneath.
5. Footer: centered copyright line.

Content to use:
- Eyebrow label: EXCHANGE FUNDING & WITHDRAWALS
- H1: Reduce funding and withdrawal risk before finality.
- Subtext: Wallet Nation enables exchanges to introduce a conditional window between instruction and finality, reducing exposure to funding and withdrawal risk without taking custody of customer assets.
- Risk label: THE RISK
- Risk stat: Instruction → Finality
- Risk paragraph: Once a funding or withdrawal instruction settles on-chain, there is no reversal. Wallet Nation introduces a conditional window before finality, giving exchanges a chance to verify and protect the transaction.
- Callout box text: CONDITIONAL WINDOW
- Key benefit 1 — Reduced withdrawal risk: Introduce a verification window between instruction and finality, reducing exposure to fraudulent or erroneous withdrawals.
- Key benefit 2 — Funding protection: Protect incoming funding transactions before they settle, without adding custodial risk to the exchange.
- Key benefit 3 — Zero disruption: Works alongside existing exchange infrastructure — no new custody model, no changes to withdrawal workflows.
- CTA headline: Ready to protect your funding and withdrawal flows?
- Button text: Talk to us
